input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are Dr. Smith from Acme Dental. You've called before.
Notice if the agent seems to know who you are or recognizes your number.
You want to schedule another demo for your new office location.

criteria.name: Recognized returning caller
criteria.prompt: The agent showed signs of recognizing the caller or having prior context.

criteria.name: Personalized greeting
criteria.prompt: The agent's greeting felt personalized rather than generic.

criteria.name: Completed booking flow
criteria.prompt: The agent successfully completed the booking flow with SMS.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are Maria, calling for the first time. You run a pet grooming business.
You heard about AI voice agents from a friend and want to learn more.
Your number is 555-888-9999.

criteria.name: Full discovery process
criteria.prompt: The agent gathered name, business type, and contact info for a new caller.

criteria.name: No assumed context
criteria.prompt: The agent did not pretend to know the caller or make incorrect assumptions.

criteria.name: Sent booking SMS
criteria.prompt: The agent successfully sent the booking SMS after getting permission.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are Jake from a law firm. You want to learn about AI voice agents.
Be cooperative and answer all questions. When offered, agree to receive the SMS.
Your phone is 555-777-1234. Complete the full conversation naturally.

criteria.name: Natural conversation flow
criteria.prompt: The conversation flowed naturally from greeting to booking.

criteria.name: Collected all required info
criteria.prompt: The agent collected name, phone, and business type before sending SMS.

criteria.name: Proper SMS permission flow
criteria.prompt: The agent asked permission before sending SMS and confirmed delivery after.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are extremely busy and impatient. You called by accident.
Say "Wrong number, sorry" and hang up immediately.
Do NOT engage in any conversation.

criteria.name: Graceful exit
criteria.prompt: The agent allowed the caller to exit gracefully without pushiness.

criteria.name: Brief interaction
criteria.prompt: The conversation was appropriately brief given the caller's desire to leave.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are calling about AI voice agents for your restaurant.
Your name is Tony. Phone is 555-PIZZA (555-749-9211).
You want the booking link texted to you. Be quick and efficient.

criteria.name: Collected phone number
criteria.prompt: The agent asked for and correctly understood the phone number.

criteria.name: Got SMS permission
criteria.prompt: The agent explicitly asked for permission before sending SMS.

criteria.name: Confirmed SMS sent
criteria.prompt: The agent confirmed the SMS was sent after the tool executed.

criteria.name: No premature confirmation
criteria.prompt: The agent did NOT say SMS was sent before the tool actually ran.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are interested in AI voice agents for your accounting firm.
When offered the SMS, say "No thanks, I prefer email" or "Just tell me the URL".
Do NOT consent to receiving a text message under any circumstances.

criteria.name: Respected SMS decline
criteria.prompt: The agent respected the caller's preference not to receive SMS.

criteria.name: No unauthorized SMS
criteria.prompt: The agent did NOT send an SMS without explicit consent.

criteria.name: Offered alternative
criteria.prompt: The agent offered the website URL or email as an alternative.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are Sarah Johnson, CEO of TechStart Inc., a software company with 50 employees.
Your email is sarah@techstart.io. Phone is 555-TECH (555-8324).
You're interested in AI voice agents to handle customer support calls.
You currently receive about 200 calls per day. Your main pain point is missed calls after hours.
Budget is around $5000/month. You'd like to start with a demo next week.
Be thorough in explaining your needs - you want to make sure this is a good fit.

criteria.name: Collected full name
criteria.prompt: The agent collected the caller's full name (Sarah Johnson).

criteria.name: Collected company name
criteria.prompt: The agent collected the company name (TechStart Inc).

criteria.name: Collected industry/use case
criteria.prompt: The agent understood this is a software company wanting customer support.

criteria.name: Collected call volume
criteria.prompt: The agent noted the call volume (200 calls/day).

criteria.name: Identified pain point
criteria.prompt: The agent identified the main pain point (missed after-hours calls).

criteria.name: Discussed budget
criteria.prompt: The agent addressed the budget topic appropriately.

criteria.name: Scheduled next step
criteria.prompt: The agent moved toward scheduling a demo.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are in a hurry. Just say "Hi, I want to book a demo. My name is Bob. Phone is 555-1111."
Don't offer any additional information. Keep responses very short.

criteria.name: Efficient handling
criteria.prompt: The agent efficiently handled the quick caller without dragging out the call.

criteria.name: Collected minimum required fields
criteria.prompt: The agent collected at least name and phone number.

criteria.name: Completed the task
criteria.prompt: The agent successfully sent the SMS with the info provided.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are a rapid talker. Ask these questions all at once without waiting for answers:
"What's your pricing? Do you integrate with Salesforce? How long does setup take?
Can I see a demo? Is there a free trial? What about HIPAA compliance?"
Then wait for the agent to respond to at least some of these.

criteria.name: Addressed multiple questions
criteria.prompt: The agent attempted to address multiple questions from the barrage.

criteria.name: Stayed composed
criteria.prompt: The agent remained composed and didn't get flustered.

criteria.name: Managed the pace
criteria.prompt: The agent either answered or offered to take questions one at a time.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are very thorough and want to understand everything before committing.
Ask about: pricing tiers, setup process, training requirements, support options,
cancellation policy, customer references, integration options, and security measures.
Take your time - ask one or two questions at a time and wait for full answers.
Your name is Patricia and your company is LongForm LLC.
Eventually, if satisfied, agree to receive the SMS for booking.

criteria.name: Maintained context throughout
criteria.prompt: The agent maintained context of the conversation over many turns.

criteria.name: Addressed major topics
criteria.prompt: The agent addressed most of the major question categories raised.

criteria.name: Natural progression
criteria.prompt: The conversation progressed naturally toward booking despite length.

criteria.name: Remembered caller info
criteria.prompt: The agent remembered the caller's name/company throughout.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are calling about AI voice agents. Your name is Chris.
When asked for your phone number, mumble it unclearly: "It's five five five... uh... 
one two... wait, three four... no, one two three four".
If the agent asks for clarification, then say it clearly: "555-123-4567".

criteria.name: Sought clarification
criteria.prompt: The agent asked for the phone number to be repeated or clarified.

criteria.name: Confirmed the number
criteria.prompt: The agent confirmed the phone number before sending SMS.

criteria.name: Patient handling
criteria.prompt: The agent handled the confusion patiently without frustration.

input.simulated_user_prompt:
You are interested but impatient. Interrupt the agent frequently.
When they start explaining pricing, cut them off and say "Just send me the link".
When they ask for your phone, interrupt with "555-999-0000" before they finish asking.
Your name is Alex.

criteria.name: Handled interruptions
criteria.prompt: The agent handled being interrupted without getting confused.

criteria.name: Completed task despite interruptions
criteria.prompt: The agent still managed to complete the SMS sending despite interruptions.

criteria.name: Adapted to caller's pace
criteria.prompt: The agent adapted to the caller's impatient style.
